description: Hour-of-day → MealType mapping. Both platforms must produce identical results for hours 0..23 in the device's local time zone.

platformNotes.ios: Uses exclusive upper bounds: 7..<10 = BREAKFAST, 11..<15 = LUNCH, 17..<21 = DINNER.
platformNotes.android: Uses inclusive ranges: 7..9 = BREAKFAST, 11..14 = LUNCH, 17..20 = DINNER.
platformNotes.convergence: Both expressions cover exactly the same hours; this fixture is the single source of truth.
